subject: Art and Design
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Guide learners in the process of identifying and critiquing various artworks.
topics: Expected Standard: Branches of Art categorised accordingly
activities: Learning Environment set up: in-door and out-door (natural / artificial and technological)
Charts and diagrams on art careers
Videos/documentaries about professionals in different art fields
Printed career profiles with job descriptions and educational requirements
Art and Design textbooks and literature
assessment: Prepare learning tasks during (learning sessions) and after (carry-home tasks) the
This subtopic looked at Art Awareness and Appreciation, it covered categories of art which
Visual arts (painting, drawing, sculpture, photography and print making)
